headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Moodys, Raises Price Target to $496
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Toni Kaplan   maintains Moodys (NYSE:MCO) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $491 to $496.

headline: BMO Capital Maintains Market Perform on Moodys, Raises Price Target to $515
summary: BMO Capital  analyst Jeffrey Silber   maintains Moodys (NYSE:MCO) with a Market Perform and raises the price target from $489 to $515.
